title: Secretary of state; rules and regulations
doc_html:
§380.57. Secretary of state; rules and regulations

            The secretary of state may adopt policies, rules, and regulations for the operation of the museum in accordance with the Administrative Procedure Act.

            Acts 2020, No. 212, §1, eff. June 11, 2020.
doc_text:
§380.57.  Secretary of state; rules and regulations
The secretary of state may adopt policies, rules, and regulations for the operation of
the museum in accordance with the Administrative Procedure Act.
Acts 2020, No. 212, §1, eff. June 11, 2020.
